name: Storm-Lancers
habitat: High-altitude 'Hard Clouds' and jagged peaks of the Scute Archipelago

stinger.function: injects a volatile biological fluid that causes rapid necrosis or combustion
stinger.mechanism: absorbs ambient Chaos radiation and converts it into a biological fluid stored in the tail sac

lifecycle.hatchling: abandoned by parents, dull, muddy scales
lifecycle.fledgling: makes first flight to the peaks, can be tamed
lifecycle.adult: sheds scales to reveal Chroma-Skin, bonds with a Rider

gear.saddle: carved from light pumice stone and lined with leather
gear.grounding chain: heavy copper chain drags from the saddle to ground any residual static charge when landing

weaponry.ram: uses its bone crest to smash through the wooden hulls of enemy airships
weaponry.stinger-whip: injects chaos-fluid into enemy engines, discharging a massive chaos-shock that disables Aether-Tech
weaponry.ray-daggers: carries harvested stingers in stone sheaths as single-use biological grenades

grounded.status: a Rider who outlives their mount never flies again
grounded.role: becomes Mentors, teaching the next generation

poaching law.crime: to a Scute, poaching a Ray is kidnapping a citizen

judgment.the chain: life slavery in the deepest stone quarries
